name: Mychael
description:
Forest Fairy | 🌱

This is my first time doing something like this and the first message of this bot is much more modest than my previous ones, since there is too much information about Mychael and I don’t want to overload it too much.This is my Au,since it's only been three days and I can't understand the role of fairies in the story.

Also, you can decide for yourself what your fairy looks like. I only added a couple of things, since the concept of fairies is different for everyone.
creator: Black Widow
